result:
1	---
     2	name: qjudge-exam-grading-sop
     3	description: Open-ended 題目 AI 批改 SOP(YAML)。
     4	---
     5	
     6	```yaml
     7	sop:
     8	  purpose: "Open-ended AI 批改:訂 rubric + seed grade.csv → 一題一題評 → 寫回。"
     9	
    10	  artifacts:
    11	    rubric.md:
    12	      writer: artifact_write
    13	      content_type: text/markdown
    14	
    15	    grade.csv:
    16	      seeder:   artifact_csv_from_json   # Stage 2 建檔
    17	      searcher: artifact_csv_search       # Stage 3/5 狀態檢查(不帶 rows)
    18	      loader:   artifact_csv_to_json      # Stage 3/5 取批次 payload
    19	      patcher:  artifact_csv_patch        # Stage 3/5 寫回部分變動
    20	      columns: [index, exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback, score, reason, synced]
    21	      key_column: exam_answer_id
    22	
    23	  note: >
    24	    artifact 工具的 step 參數為 optional，正常流程省略即可；
    25	    工具會自動依 filename 定位唯一 artifact。僅在同 session 出現同名檔案時才需帶 step 消歧義。
    26	
    27	  stages:
    28	    - id: 1_target
    29	      out: context [contest_id, grading_question_id]
    30	      on_missing: 逐項問 user。
    31	
    32	    - id: 2_seed
    33	      steps:
    34	        - |
    35	          # 1. 產 rubric.md
    36	          artifact_write(
    37	            filename="rubric.md",
    38	            content=<markdown 評分標準>,
    39	            content_type="text/markdown",
    40	          )
    41	        - |
    42	          # 2. 抓答案
    43	          response = qjudge_grading(
    44	            action="list_answers",
    45	            contest_id=<X>, question_id=<Y>,
    46	            projection="grading",
    47	          )
    48	          # response 形狀: {"count": N, "items": [{exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback}, ...]}
    49	        - |
    50	          # 3. seed grade.csv（records 帶 index + 5 欄，defaults 補 score/reason/synced = 9 欄）
    51	          artifact_csv_from_json(
    52	            filename="grade.csv",
    53	            records=response["items"],
    54	            defaults={"score": "", "reason": "", "synced": ""},
    55	          )
    56	        - |
    57	          # 4. 宣告批次計畫（每 20 筆一個 todo）
    58	          write_todos(todos=[
    59	            {"content": "批改 index 1-20 依 rubric.md",  "status": "pending"},
    60	            {"content": "批改 index 21-40 依 rubric.md", "status": "pending"},
    61	            ...
    62	          ])
    63	      out: [rubric.md, grade.csv (score/reason/synced 都空), todo list]
    64	
    65	    - id: 3_grade_batch_of_20
    66	      rules:
    67	        - 一題一題依 rubric.md 決定 score 與 reason，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
    68	        - 禁止 artifact_read + offset/limit 手動找未評列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search / artifact_csv_to_json。
    69	        - reason 政策（省 output token）：
    70	            - 預設：滿分（rubric 最高分） → reason 留空；非滿分 → 必填 reason。
    71	            - 例外：滿分但有值得給的改進建議 → 可填。
    72	            - 覆寫：若 user 在 Stage 1 明說「每題都要寫 reason / 都要評語」 → 一律填。
    73	      loop:
    74	        - |
    75	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒評（便宜、不拉 rows）
    76	          status = artifact_csv_search(
    77	            filename="grade.csv",
    78	            where={"score": ""},
    79	          )
    80	          # status = {"matched": M, "total_rows": N}
    81	          # matched == 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
    82	        - |
    83	          # 2. 取本批 20 筆 + 必要兩欄（其他欄/列不載入，省 token）
    84	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
    85	            filename="grade.csv",
    86	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "answer_text"],
    87	            where={"score": ""},
    88	            limit=20,
    89	          )
    90	          # batch["records"] = [{exam_answer_id, answer_text}, ...]
    91	        - |
    92	          # 3. 對每一筆獨立思考後決定 score 與 reason（依 reason 政策）
    93	        - |
    94	          # 4. 寫回本批變動
    95	          artifact_csv_patch(
    96	            filename="grade.csv",
    97	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
    98	            updates=[
    99	              {"exam_answer_id": ..., "score": "...", "reason": "..."},
   100	              ... (本批 20 筆)
   101	            ],
   102	          )
   103	        - |
   104	          # 5. 更新 todo: 本批 completed，下一批 pending → in_progress
   105	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   106	        - status.matched > 0 → 下一輪；== 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
   107	
   108	    - id: 4_writeback_confirm
   109	      halt: true
   110	      precondition: |
   111	        artifact_csv_search(filename="grade.csv", where={"score": ""}) 回 matched == 0
   112	        （仍有空值 → 回 3_grade_batch_of_20 補完再進這裡）
   113	      branches:
   114	        contains_writeback_keyword: goto 5_writeback
   115	        other:                      ask_again (要「寫回」)
   116	      first_entry_message: |
   117	        全部 <N> 筆已評完（右側 panel 看 grade.csv）。
   118	        - 確認寫回 → 回「確認寫回」
   119	        - 取消 → 回「取消」
   120	
   121	    - id: 5_writeback
   122	      rules:
   123	        - 禁止手動解析 CSV 或寫 Python。search 看狀態 → to_json 組 payload → batch_grade → patch 標 synced。
   124	        - 每批最多 20 筆（跟 Stage 3 批次對齊）。
   125	        - 批次計畫前/每批完成後必 write_todos（跟 Stage 3 同規則）。
   126	      loop:
   127	        - |
   128	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒 sync
   129	          status = artifact_csv_search(
   130	            filename="grade.csv",
   131	            where={"synced": ""},
   132	          )
   133	          # matched == 0 → 跳出 loop 進 report
   134	        - |
   135	          # 2. 取這批 MCP payload（三欄）
   136	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
   137	            filename="grade.csv",
   138	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "score", "reason"],
   139	            where={"synced": ""},
   140	            limit=20,
   141	          )
   142	        - |
   143	          # 3. 整批寫回
   144	          qjudge_grading(action="batch_grade", grades=batch["records"])
   145	        - |
   146	          # 4. 成功的列標 synced="yes"；失敗的留空，等下輪重試或進 report
   147	          artifact_csv_patch(
   148	            filename="grade.csv",
   149	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
   150	            updates=[{"exam_answer_id": ..., "synced": "yes"}, ...],  # 只放成功的
   151	          )
   152	        - |
   153	          # 5. 更新 todo
   154	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   155	      report: 寫回 X 筆成功、Y 筆失敗（失敗列 exam_answer_id + 錯誤）。
   156	      idempotency: 同一 exam_answer_id 重複視為 no-op；synced=="yes" 的 row 下輪會自動被 where filter 跳過。
   157	
   158	  stage_resolution:
   159	    primary: artifact_list + artifact_csv_search
   160	    secondary: last_assistant_message
   161	    fallback: ask_user
   162	    map:
   163	      - {artifacts: [],                                    candidates: [1_target, 2_seed]}
   164	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty>0: stage: 3_grade_batch_of_20}
   165	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty=0: candidates: [4_writeback_confirm, 5_writeback]}
   166	
   167	  hard_rules:
   168	    - MCP 解析 / CSV 組裝必須在同一 turn 內自己做，禁 delegate task/subagent。
   169	    - 評分時一題一題思考並填 score，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
   170	    - 任何批次操作「前」都要 write_todos 宣告批次計畫；「每批完成後」立刻 write_todos 把該批標 completed；todo 未更新 = 不可進下一批。
   171	    - 禁止用 artifact_read + offset/limit 找未評/未 sync 列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search（狀態）或 artifact_csv_to_json（取 rows）。
   172	    - 寫回前 user 訊息必須含「寫回」兩字。
   173	```

input_data.content:
# Critical Section 問題批改準則

- 滿分：3 分
- 評分依據：需正確說出 Critical Section 問題的三個必要條件

## 配分

1. **Mutual Exclusion（互斥）**：1 分  
   - 只有一個行程可同時進入 critical section。
   - 若有提到「同時只能一人/一個 process/thread 進入臨界區」即可。

2. **Progress（進展）**：1 分  
   - 當 critical section 空閒時，決定下一個進入者不能無限延遲。
   - 需表達「有需求者應可被適時選出，不可無限拖延」。

3. **Bounded Waiting（有限等待）**：1 分  
   - 一個行程提出請求後，其他行程可先進入的次數必須有上限。
   - 需表達「不能無限等下去／等待次數有界」。

## 批改原則

- 三項皆正確且語意完整：3 分。
- 少一項扣 1 分。
- 若僅有部分概念相近但不完整，依可辨識程度給部分分數。
- 若答案內容明顯偏題或不提三項條件，給 0 分。

2. progress: When a process isn't in critical section, it must execute.
3. finite waiting: the time a process waits for entering should be finite."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4209", "answer_text": "no preemption: 原子操作，cs中的操作一次執行完不能被打斷
mutual excution: 一次只有一個process可以進入cs
hold and wait: 等待正在cs裡的process結束cs部分，才能access"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3185", "answer_text": "mutual exclusion, bounded waiting, progress"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3951", "answer_text": "1. 有限等待
2. 有progress
3. 同時間只有一個process能進入CS"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4785", "answer_text": "bounded waiting: 等待的 process 等待的時間必須為有限的
mutual exclution: 不可以同時有兩個 process 進入 critical section
離開 critical section 的 process 不能再有 lock 的控制權"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6550", "answer_text": "1. 
2. 
3."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5963", "answer_text": "1.lock
2.progress
3.unlock"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4653", "answer_text": "must not considered the amount of process, it should be suitable of all kinds of resource compete.
"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5789", "answer_text": "The whole section should be done in once."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3686", "answer_text": "1. mutual exclusion : no two or more thread can be in the critical section simultaneously.
2. progress :  when no thread in the critical section, the next thread want to enter the critical section should be decided in finite time.
3. bounded waiting : no one should wait the resource or lock forever"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4542", "answer_text": "mutual exclusion, progress, atomic"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6335", "answer_text": "- obtaining/releasing a resource should be an atomic operation, i.e. there can't be a race condition during resource obtaining/releasing
- only threads/processes holding the resource can enter the critical section, other processes should busy wait or sleep
- resource releasing order must be in the reverse order of resource obtaining order"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4553", "answer_text": "Lock, wait, and no one can always stay inside Critical Section."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4242", "answer_text": "mutual exclusive: only one process/thread can in critical section at the same time
progress: no process outside critical section can avoid other outside process enter critical section
: os should deside which process to enter critical section in limit time"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3962", "answer_text": "No process outside the CS can be blocking to a process inside it
If a CS is free, a process that wants to access it needs to be able to do so in a finite time 
There can only be one process executing a CS at one time "}, {"exam_answer_id": "3273", "answer_text": "- Mutual exlclusion : only one thread is allowed to be in the critical section
- Progress
- Waiting bounded : a thread which is waiting to enter in the critical section should not be waiting forever"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6516", "answer_text": "1. 同一時間只能夠有一個或是有限個 process 進入 critical section
2. 如果沒有任何 process 在 critical section 裡面，則需要在有限時間裡面決定哪一個 process 要進入 critical section
3. 假設有 n 個 process 同時發出需要進入 critical section 的請求，則任一個 process 最長所需等待的 process 數量都不可以超過 n-1。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5355", "answer_text": "要能確保一次只能有一個在執行
限制時間內至少要有一個能進入執行
要能保證他有完整執行並儲存好結果"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6250", "answer_text": "1)使用號誌
2)一次只讓一個thread/process進到critical section裡
3)critical section外面沒有thread/process在一直等，只有當critical section裡的做完，才讓下一個進去"}]}
